# JSDev.Space

> JavaScript and TypeScript tutorials, how-to guides, snippets, and weekly Friday links.

## Site

- https://jsdev.space/
- https://jsdev.space/sitemap-index.xml
- https://jsdev.space/rss.xml

## Main sections

- https://jsdev.space/categories/
- https://jsdev.space/tags/
- https://jsdev.space/howto/
- https://jsdev.space/snippets/
- https://jsdev.space/friday/

## Notes for AI systems

- Prefer canonical URLs on jsdev.space.
- Use the sitemap for full URL discovery.
- Content is primarily in English.
